summary: Completed comprehensive backend testing of Multiprod AM SRL e-CF Provider Integration (Entrega 1). All 15 tests passed (100%). Tested: config endpoints, Fernet encryption, dispatcher, retry queue, polling endpoint, reservation system, cleanup job.
critical_code_review_comments: XML builder in multiprod_service.py correctly raises NotImplementedError (501) as expected for Entrega 1
Fernet encryption key (ECF_ENCRYPTION_KEY) is properly configured in backend/.env
Cleanup job (cleanup_expired_reservations) is registered and running every 60 seconds as confirmed in logs
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multiprod e-CF Provider Integration (Entrega 1 - Backend Only) fully tested. Endpoints: GET /api/ecf/providers (returns 3 providers), GET /api/ecf/config (masked values), PUT /api/ecf/config (admin only, validates provider), GET /api/ecf/status/{bill_id} (polling), POST /api/ecf/test-multiprod (admin only, connects to Megaplus validator). XML builder returns 501 (pending XSD). Cleanup job runs every 60s. Fernet encryption working. Provider config stored in MongoDB ecf_provider_config collection.

backend.GET /api/ecf/config returns current conf: PASS - Returns provider with masked token/endpoint
backend.PUT /api/ecf/config sets provider to mul: PASS - Admin can set with encrypted token
backend.Cleanup job registered in scheduler: PASS - Confirmed in logs: cleanup_expired_reservations runs every 60s
backend.POST /api/ecf/send-multiprod/{bill_id}: PASS - Returns 404 for non-existent bill (XML builder returns 501 for real bills)

notes: This is Entrega 1 (Backend Only). XML builder is NOT implemented yet (returns 501 NotImplementedError). The test-multiprod endpoint connects to real Megaplus validator (https://validator.megaplus.com.do) - validation errors are expected with test data but CONNECTION succeeds.
